title: Xixi branch preview dashboard
objective: Provide one clear local webpage where the owner can inspect projects and branches, start an isolated preview with one click, and open the running result without remembering ports or commands.

tasks.title: Define registered project and branch status model
tasks.acceptance: A local registry stores selected projects without committing machine-specific paths, and the API reports current branch, recent branches, dirty state, and last commit.

tasks.title: Implement isolated branch preview lifecycle
tasks.acceptance: A registered branch can reuse its checkout or obtain a detached worktree, then start and stop on a unique port with a branch-specific data namespace.

tasks.title: Build the project preview center
tasks.acceptance: The responsive webpage presents projects first, reveals branch details on demand, and uses one primary action to start or open a preview with visible loading and error states.

tasks.title: Register the three active owner projects
tasks.acceptance: Gongtu, CanvasStorm, and Code Quest appear with their real local branch state and explicit preview isolation capability.

tasks.title: Verify and publish evidence
tasks.acceptance: Unit tests, HTTP API checks, and browser screenshots prove the dashboard and at least one real branch preview; documentation records limitations and next actions.
